user.title: Connect to MeshCentral
user.description: If your account has 2FA enabled, create a Login Token in MeshCentral → My Account → Login Tokens and use those credentials here.

data.use_ssl: Use SSL (disable if behind reverse proxy with tlsOffload)

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed — check username and password

abort.already_configured: This MeshCentral server is already configured
